.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(34, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(34, 31, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-property-key.background: color(srgb 0.15232 0.1408 0.1792) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(32, 29, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--bases-cards-shadow-hover: 0 0 0 1px hsl(from hsl(258 12% calc(12% + 1 * 11%)) h s calc(l + 4 * 1))
body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 12%, 12%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(258, 12%, 12%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 12%, 12%) 65%, transparent))
body.--i-active-line-highlight-inactive: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) 0.65 c h / 0.1) l c h / 0.05)
body.--i-editor-border-hover: hsl(from hsl(258 12% calc(12% + 1 * 11%)) h s calc(l + 4 * 1))
body.--i-link-underline-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) 0.8 0.05 h) l c h / 0.35)
body.--indentation-guide-color-active: hsl(from hsl(258 12% calc(12% + 1 * 11%)) h s calc(l + 4 * 1))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 12%, 12%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(258, 12%, 12%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 12%, 12%) 65%, transparent))
body.--text-accent-hover: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) 0.8 0.05 h) calc(l + 0.15) c h)
body.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-title.background: rgba(2, 122, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(70, 65, 83, 0.49) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(70, 65, 83, 0.49) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(49, 45, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(49, 45, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(29, 27, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
